description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a prominent marquee labeled 'PIXELMAN' at the top, rendered in a retro pixelated font. The front panel includes a large display screen, a control panel with visible buttons and joystick, and a coin slot below. The side panels are decorated with vibrant pixel art characters: the left side shows a male superhero figure labeled 'PIXELMAN', while the right side features a female character labeled 'PIXELGIRL', both set against a blue sky with clouds. The lower front panel displays additional pixel art, including a tank and cityscape, enhancing the nostalgic arcade theme. The back of the cabinet is plain black with a small label and visible power cord. The cabinet is constructed primarily from wood or MDF, with plastic and metal components for the controls and screen.
description: A classic upright arcade game cabinet with retro pixel art characters, a large screen, and a control panel with joystick and buttons. The cabinet features colorful side graphics and a prominent 'PIXELMAN' marquee.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'PIXELMAN' marquee, display screen, control panel with buttons and joystick, coin slot, and pixel art on the lower panel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the 'PIXELMAN' superhero character artwork and the blue sky background, as well as the cabinet's profile and power cord.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain black back panel, a small label, and the power cord extending from the bottom.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring the 'PIXELGIRL' character artwork, blue sky background, and the cabinet's profile.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, flat front, medium size with a visible bezel around the display area
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and several round buttons, arranged in a classic arcade style with colorful markings
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the word 'PIXELMAN' in large, red pixelated letters on a white background with a blue border, matching the retro video game theme
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display large pixel art characters: the left side features 'PIXELMAN' (male superhero), and the right side features 'PIXELGIRL' (female superhero), both set against a blue sky with clouds
